title: SEO Audit Checklist for Pune Websites | Growthik
description: Run a Pune-focused SEO audit with 50 checks for crawlability, local SEO, content, Core Web Vitals, internal links and lead-focused pages.

faqs.question: What is a technical SEO audit?
faqs.answer: A technical SEO audit is a comprehensive diagnostic process that checks a website's technical health, ensuring search engines can crawl, index and understand the site efficiently.

faqs.question: Why is site speed important for SEO?
faqs.answer: Site speed is a direct ranking factor for Google. Faster websites provide a better user experience, reduce bounce rates and improve Core Web Vitals scores.

faqs.question: What are the most common technical SEO issues?
faqs.answer: Common issues include broken links (404s), slow page load times, missing or duplicate meta tags, poor mobile optimization and improper use of canonical tags.

faqs.question: How do I check if my site is mobile-friendly?
faqs.answer: You can use Google's Mobile-Friendly Test tool or check the Mobile Usability report in Google Search Console to identify any mobile rendering issues.

faqs.question: What is a canonical tag?
faqs.answer: A canonical tag (rel='canonical') tells search engines which version of a URL you want to appear in search results, preventing duplicate content issues.

faqs.question: How often should I conduct an SEO audit?
faqs.answer: A comprehensive technical SEO audit should be conducted at least twice a year, or whenever you perform a major website migration or redesign.

faqs.question: What role does HTTPS play in SEO?
faqs.answer: HTTPS is a ranking signal. Secure websites build trust with users and are favored by search engines over non-secure HTTP sites.

faqs.question: How to fix duplicate content issues?
faqs.answer: Fix duplicate content by implementing 301 redirects, using canonical tags to point to the primary page, or rewriting the content to make it unique.

faqs.question: What is schema markup in an SEO audit?
faqs.answer: Schema markup is structured data vocabulary added to a website's code that helps search engines better understand the content and provide rich snippets in search results.

faqs.question: Why are H1 tags important?
faqs.answer: H1 tags act as the main headline for a page, giving search engines a strong signal about the primary topic and keyword focus of that specific URL.

faqs.question: What is the impact of toxic backlinks?
faqs.answer: Toxic or spammy backlinks can harm your website's authority and potentially lead to Google penalties. They should be identified during an audit and disavowed if necessary.

faqs.question: Can I do a technical SEO audit myself?
faqs.answer: While you can use automated tools for basic checks, a thorough technical SEO audit requires expert knowledge to interpret the data, understand the 'why' and implement complex fixes correctly.

sections.heading: Section 1: Technical SEO Foundations for Pune Websites
sections.content: Most SEO audits are just a pile of data. They tell you what is wrong, but not why it matters for leads in Pune or how to fix it for revenue. This 50-point diagnostic is the framework we use at Growthik to find technical, local SEO and content leaks that cost businesses search visibility.Section 1: Technical SEO Foundations for Pune WebsitesBefore you write a single word of content, you need to fix the engine. If Google's bots are hitting dead ends or slow loads, your authority is zero.Is your site indexed by Google? (Check: site:yourdomain.com)Is HTTPS enabled on all pages?Is there a robots.txt file? Does it block any important pages?Is your XML sitemap submitted to Google Search Console?Are there any crawl errors in Google Search Console?Is the canonical tag properly set on all pages?Are there duplicate pages (www vs non-www, HTTP vs HTTPS)?Is your site mobile-friendly? (Use Google's Mobile-Friendly Test)What are your Core Web Vitals scores? (LCP, CLS, INP)Is your page loading speed under 3 seconds?A technically broken website is like a perfectly written book that no one can open. Fix the foundation before building the content.Section 2: On-Page SEOOn-page SEO ensures each page is properly optimized to target the right keywords, including service and locality terms like "SEO audit Pune", "website design company in Pune" and "digital marketing agency Pune".Does every page have a unique, keyword-rich title tag (50–60 chars)?Does every page have a unique meta description (150–160 chars)?Is there a single H1 tag per page containing the target keyword?Are H2/H3 headings used logically with secondary keywords?Is your target keyword used naturally in the first 100 words?Are images compressed and do they have descriptive alt text?Do internal links use descriptive anchor text?Are URLs short, descriptive and keyword-rich (no IDs or ?=)?Is your content longer and more comprehensive than competing pages?Is schema markup (JSON-LD) implemented for your business type?Section 3: Content Quality & E-E-A-TGoogle's Helpful Content updates have made content quality more critical than ever. Thin, duplicate, or AI-spam content is actively penalized.Does your content demonstrate first-hand experience and expertise?Is there original research, data, or unique insights in your key pages?Are there clear author bios with credentials?Is your blog content regularly updated?Do you have thin content pages with under 300 words that need expansion?Are there any pages with duplicate or near-duplicate content?Section 4: Backlink ProfileYour backlink profile is a powerful ranking signal. Both the quantity and quality of sites linking to you matter significantly.How many unique domains are linking to your site? (Check Ahrefs/SEMrush)Are your top linking domains relevant to your industry?Are there any toxic or spammy backlinks pointing to your site?Do competitors have significantly more backlinks than you?Have you submitted your business to key Indian directories (Justdial, IndiaMart)?Is your Google Business Profile complete and optimized?Section 5: Local SEO (For Pune Businesses)Local SEO helps your business appear for 'near me' and city-specific searches - critical for Pune-based businesses.Is your Google Business Profile fully completed with photos, hours, and services?Are your NAP details (Name, Address, Phone) consistent across all directories?Do you have 10+ Google reviews with responses from the business?Do you have location-specific pages for different Pune areas?Is LocalBusiness schema implemented on your contact/about page?ConclusionCompleting this SEO audit will give you a clear roadmap of what to fix and what to prioritize. The good news is that identifying these issues is the hard part - most fixes are straightforward once you know what to look for. At Growthik Media, we offer a free comprehensive SEO audit for Pune businesses. Book yours today and receive a detailed report within 48 hours.

Secure websites build trust with users and are favored by search engines over non-secure HTTP sites.How to fix duplicate content issues?Fix duplicate content by implementing 301 redirects, using canonical tags to point to the primary page, or rewriting the content to make it unique.What is schema markup in an SEO audit?Schema markup is structured data vocabulary added to a website's code that helps search engines better understand the content and provide rich snippets in search results.Why are H1 tags important?H1 tags act as the main headline for a page, giving search engines a strong signal about the primary topic and keyword focus of that specific URL.What is the impact of toxic backlinks?Toxic or spammy backlinks can harm your website's authority and potentially lead to Google penalties. They should be identified during an audit and disavowed if necessary.Can I do a technical SEO audit myself?While you can use automated tools for basic checks, a thorough technical SEO audit requires expert knowledge to interpret the data, understand the 'why' and implement complex fixes correctly.
